{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Lifeway Unique Homes is a leading real estate and property development company based in Lagos State, Nigeria. We specialize in real estate development, property investment, property consultancy, and the construction of high-quality residential and commercial properties.

With a commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we help individuals and businesses achieve their property ownership and investment goals. Our services range from developing modern housing projects and providing strategic property investment solutions to building bespoke homes for private clients.

At Lifeway Unique Homes, we are passionate about creating sustainable developments, delivering exceptional value, and transforming communities through quality real estate solutions. As a growing organization, we are dedicated to fostering a professional, collaborative, and rewarding work environment where talented individuals can build successful careers and make a meaningful impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and accounting documents.
	Record daily financial transactions and update accounting systems.
	Prepare bank reconciliations and monitor cash flow.
	Process invoices, payments, receipts, and expense claims.
	Assist in preparing monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Monitor accounts payable and accounts receivable.
	Support budget preparation and financial forecasting.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and relevant financial regulations.
	Assist with internal and external audits.
	Prepare payroll information and statutory remittances where required.
	Maintain confidentiality of financial information.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	3&ndash;6 years of accounting experience.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Knowledge of Nigerian financial regulations and tax requirements.
	Strong numerical and analytical skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certification such as ICAN, ACCA, or ATS (or currently pursuing one).
	Experience working with accounting software such as Sage, QuickBooks, or Tally.


Skills:


	Financial reporting
	Bookkeeping
	Bank reconciliation
	Budgeting and forecasting
	Data analysis
	Time management
	Problem-solving
	Attention to detail.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: lifewayuniquehomes@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Account Officer Job at Lifeway Unique Homes




        
    

        
        Lifeway Unique Homes is a leading real estate and property development company based in Lagos State, Nigeria. We specialize in real estate development, property investment, property consultancy, and the construction of high-quality residential and commercial properties.

With a commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we help individuals and businesses achieve their property ownership and investment goals. Our services range from developing modern housing projects and providing strategic property investment solutions to building bespoke homes for private clients.
     

            
    



At Lifeway Unique Homes, we are passionate about creating sustainable developments, delivering exceptional value, and transforming communities through quality real estate solutions. As a growing organization, we are dedicated to fostering a professional, collaborative, and rewarding work environment where talented individuals can build successful careers and make a meaningful impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and accounting documents.
	Record daily financial transactions and update accounting systems.
	Prepare bank reconciliations and monitor cash flow.
	Process invoices, payments, receipts, and expense claims.
	Assist in preparing monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Monitor accounts payable and accounts receivable.
	Support budget preparation and financial forecasting.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and relevant financial regulations.
	Assist with internal and external audits.
	Prepare payroll information and statutory remittances where required.
	Maintain confidentiality of financial information.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	3–6 years of accounting experience.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Knowledge of Nigerian financial regulations and tax requirements.
	Strong numerical and analytical skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certification such as ICAN, ACCA, or ATS (or currently pursuing one).
	Experience working with accounting software such as Sage, QuickBooks, or Tally.


Skills:


	Financial reporting
	Bookkeeping
	Bank reconciliation
	Budgeting and forecasting
	Data analysis
	Time management
	Problem-solving
	Attention to detail.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Real Estate Marketing Executive",
  "description": "Lifeway Unique Homes is a leading real estate and property development company based in Lagos State, Nigeria. We specialize in real estate development, property investment, property consultancy, and the construction of high-quality residential and commercial properties.

With a commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we help individuals and businesses achieve their property ownership and investment goals. Our services range from developing modern housing projects and providing strategic property investment solutions to building bespoke homes for private clients.

At Lifeway Unique Homes, we are passionate about creating sustainable developments, delivering exceptional value, and transforming communities through quality real estate solutions. As a growing organization, we are dedicated to fostering a professional, collaborative, and rewarding work environment where talented individuals can build successful careers and make a meaningful impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Real Estate Marketing Executive&nbsp;

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos

Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Strategy Execution: Develop and implement targeted marketing strategies to promote the company&rsquo;s real estate properties and services.
	Lead Generation: Generate quality leads, follow up on inquiries, and successfully convert prospects into clients.
	Digital &amp; Social Media Marketing: Promote property listings actively across social media platforms and other digital marketing channels.
	Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with clients, investors, and strategic business partners.
	Site Inspections &amp; Events: Organize and participate in physical property inspections, exhibitions, and promotional marketing events.
	Content Creation: Prepare engaging marketing materials, presentations, and promotional campaigns.
	Market Insights: Conduct continuous market research to identify emerging real estate trends and new business opportunities.
	Sales Collaboration: Work closely with the core sales team to meet and exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets.


Requirements


	Education: Minimum of an OND, HND, or Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication, or any related field.
	Experience: Previous experience in marketing, sales, or the real estate industry is a strong advantage.
	Core Skills: Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Digital Literacy: Strong knowledge of social media marketing and basic computer skills (Microsoft Office Suite).
	Work Style: Self-motivated, target-driven, and fully capable of working effectively with minimal supervision.


What We Offer


	Attractive base salary plus performance-based commissions.
	Career growth and professional development opportunities.
	A supportive, dynamic, and collaborative work environment.
	The opportunity to grow with one of the fastest-growing real estate companies.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: lifewayuniquehomes@gmail.com using &ldquo;Marketing Executive Application.&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

Real Estate Marketing Executive Job at Lifeway Unique Homes




        
    

        
        Lifeway Unique Homes is a leading real estate and property development company based in Lagos State, Nigeria. We specialize in real estate development, property investment, property consultancy, and the construction of high-quality residential and commercial properties.

With a commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we help individuals and businesses achieve their property ownership and investment goals. Our services range from developing modern housing projects and providing strategic property investment solutions to building bespoke homes for private clients.
     

            
    



At Lifeway Unique Homes, we are passionate about creating sustainable developments, delivering exceptional value, and transforming communities through quality real estate solutions. As a growing organization, we are dedicated to fostering a professional, collaborative, and rewarding work environment where talented individuals can build successful careers and make a meaningful impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Real Estate Marketing Executive 

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos

Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Strategy Execution: Develop and implement targeted marketing strategies to promote the company’s real estate properties and services.
	Lead Generation: Generate quality leads, follow up on inquiries, and successfully convert prospects into clients.
	Digital & Social Media Marketing: Promote property listings actively across social media platforms and other digital marketing channels.
	Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with clients, investors, and strategic business partners.
	Site Inspections & Events: Organize and participate in physical property inspections, exhibitions, and promotional marketing events.
	Content Creation: Prepare engaging marketing materials, presentations, and promotional campaigns.
	Market Insights: Conduct continuous market research to identify emerging real estate trends and new business opportunities.
	Sales Collaboration: Work closely with the core sales team to meet and exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets.


Requirements


	Education: Minimum of an OND, HND, or Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication, or any related field.
	Experience: Previous experience in marketing, sales, or the real estate industry is a strong advantage.
	Core Skills: Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Digital Literacy: Strong knowledge of social media marketing and basic computer skills (Microsoft Office Suite).
	Work Style: Self-motivated, target-driven, and fully capable of working effectively with minimal supervision.


What We Offer


	Attractive base salary plus performance-based commissions.
	Career growth and professional development opportunities.
	A supportive, dynamic, and collaborative work environment.
	The opportunity to grow with one of the fastest-growing real estate companies.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Marketing Executive Application.” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Lazeto Hotels is a newly established four star hotel located in the Zango area of Kogi, Lokoja Nigeria.The hotel boasts 11 elegantly designed rooms,a roof top bar, restuarant,gym,swimming pool,fish pond.Strategically positioned to cater to business travellers,tourists and locals.Lazeto hotels aims to provide exceptional hospitality services in the confluence city.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Marketer

Job Location: Zango, Kogi
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative, innovative, and results-driven Social Media Marketer to manage our online presence, grow brand awareness, and drive customer engagement across our digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media marketing strategies.
	Create engaging content, including graphics, photos, videos, and captions.
	Manage the hotel&rsquo;s social media accounts and respond to messages and comments promptly.
	Plan and schedule posts across multiple social media platforms.
	Monitor social media trends and recommend new marketing ideas.
	Run and monitor paid advertising campaigns where required.
	Track and report social media performance using analytics tools.
	Work closely with management to promote hotel services, events, and special offers.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Proven experience in social media management and digital marketing.
	Strong content creation, copywriting, and communication skills.
	Knowledge of graphic design tools such as Canva or Adobe Creative Suite is an added advantage.
	Familiarity with Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and other social media platforms.
	Ability to analyze campaign performance and improve engagement.
	Creative, self-motivated, and results-oriented.
	Applicants must reside within or around the Zango area.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: Lazetohotels@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Social Media Marketer Job at Lazeto Hotels




        
    

        
        Lazeto Hotels is a newly established four star hotel located in the Zango area of Kogi, Lokoja Nigeria.The hotel boasts 11 elegantly designed rooms,a roof top bar, restuarant,gym,swimming pool,fish pond.Strategically positioned to cater to business travellers,tourists and locals.Lazeto hotels aims to provide exceptional hospitality services in the confluence city.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Marketer

Job Location: Zango, Kogi
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for a creative, innovative, and results-driven Social Media Marketer to manage our online presence, grow brand awareness, and drive customer engagement across our digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media marketing strategies.
	Create engaging content, including graphics, photos, videos, and captions.
	Manage the hotel’s social media accounts and respond to messages and comments promptly.
	Plan and schedule posts across multiple social media platforms.
	Monitor social media trends and recommend new marketing ideas.
	Run and monitor paid advertising campaigns where required.
	Track and report social media performance using analytics tools.
	Work closely with management to promote hotel services, events, and special offers.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Proven experience in social media management and digital marketing.
	Strong content creation, copywriting, and communication skills.
	Knowledge of graphic design tools such as Canva or Adobe Creative Suite is an added advantage.
	Familiarity with Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and other social media platforms.
	Ability to analyze campaign performance and improve engagement.
	Creative, self-motivated, and results-oriented.
	Applicants must reside within or around the Zango area.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Account / Sales Manager - Instrumentation / Oil & Gas",
  "description": "Honeywell is a Fortune 100 company that invents and manufactures technologies to address tough challenges linked to global macrotrends such as safety, security, and energy. With approximately 129,000 employees worldwide, including more than 19,000 engineers and scientists, we have an unrelenting focus on quality, delivery, value, and technology in everything we make and do.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Account / Sales Manager - Instrumentation / Oil &amp; Gas

Job ID: 149369
Job Location: Lagos (Hybrid)
Category: Sales

Job Description


	We have an opportunity for a Sr. Account Manager- Sub Sahara Africa. This position manages the day to day business and strategies: maintaining a balanced approach to superior customer service and strategic account planning; quarterly results and long term account goals; Identifies new sales opportunities and focuses on providing consultative support by building value propositions for solutions into the account;
	Manage and build customer contacts, serving as the customer&rsquo;s ambassador ,&ldquo;trusted advisor&rdquo; and advocate; Focal point for customer relationship, account, sales plans, proposals, contract negotiations, etc.
	Drives sales campaign and Business strategic initiatives Plan for account growth in the long term.


Key Responsibilities
Sales Process:


	Manages the day to day business and strategies: maintaining a balanced approach to superior customer service and strategic account planning; quarterly results and long term account goals;
	Identifies new sales opportunities and focuses on providing consultative support by building value propositions for solutions into the account;
	Manage and build customer contacts, serving as the customer&rsquo;s ambassador , &ldquo;trusted advisor&rdquo; and advocate; Focal point for customer relationship, account, sales plans, proposals, contract negotiations, etc.
	Drives sales campaign and Business strategic initiatives
	Plan for account growth in the long term


Customers:


	Pursue growth through regular both face to face meetings and winning new customers to enlarge the assigned territory


People Management:


	Leverages and marshals cross functional company resources to address customers&rsquo; drivers and initiatives in a consultative manner.
	Guides and leverages management and executive sponsor interactions with the customer.
	Leads peers by influence to ensure coordination and support to pursue orders.


Requirements
You Must Have:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in engineering preferably with Electrical / Electronics / Instrumentation background.
	Minimum 5 years of experience in Instrumentation/Automation sales in O &amp; G, Petrochemical, Power &amp; water, Mining industry. Proven track record of success in this business environment.
	Proven track record in managing Key O&amp;G Customers in the region is a must.
	Proven track record in Channel Management
	Technical expertise on Instrumentation &amp; Fixed Gas biz is a must.
	Experienced in operating as a salesperson in an international, highly matrix organization; multi-country management experience is a must.
	Experienced in maneuvering through complex process with political agility and savvy
	Commercial excellence and Sales management through CRM (Salesforce)


Technical Skills &amp; Required Specific Knowledge:


	&nbsp;A well-developed sense of the industry and market trends in the assigned territory and vertical
	Good knowledge of our customers&rsquo; businesses and drivers
	Financial and business acumen
	Account/Channel Management, ability to use market and marketing data to build successful accounts plans
	Good knowledge of commercial terms, EPC contract T&amp;Cs, etc.
	Be champion of Sales Process and Disciplines.


We value:


	Demonstrated ability to develop and foster strong customer relationships
	In-depth knowledge of Instrumentation/Fixed Gas Product and solutions.
	Strong verbal and written communications skills
	Familiarity with industry regulatory requirements and future mandates
	Ability to achieve results through influence in a matrixed-team environment
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-27",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-28",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "HONEYWELL"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }

Senior Account / Sales Manager - Instrumentation / Oil & Gas Job at Honeywell




        
    

        
        Honeywell is a Fortune 100 company that invents and manufactures technologies to address tough challenges linked to global macrotrends such as safety, security, and energy. With approximately 129,000 employees worldwide, including more than 19,000 engineers and scientists, we have an unrelenting focus on quality, delivery, value, and technology in everything we make and do.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Account / Sales Manager - Instrumentation / Oil & Gas

Job ID: 149369
Job Location: Lagos (Hybrid)
Category: Sales

Job Description
     

            
    




	We have an opportunity for a Sr. Account Manager- Sub Sahara Africa. This position manages the day to day business and strategies: maintaining a balanced approach to superior customer service and strategic account planning; quarterly results and long term account goals; Identifies new sales opportunities and focuses on providing consultative support by building value propositions for solutions into the account;
	Manage and build customer contacts, serving as the customer’s ambassador ,“trusted advisor” and advocate; Focal point for customer relationship, account, sales plans, proposals, contract negotiations, etc.
	Drives sales campaign and Business strategic initiatives Plan for account growth in the long term.


Key Responsibilities
Sales Process:


	Manages the day to day business and strategies: maintaining a balanced approach to superior customer service and strategic account planning; quarterly results and long term account goals;
	Identifies new sales opportunities and focuses on providing consultative support by building value propositions for solutions into the account;
	Manage and build customer contacts, serving as the customer’s ambassador , “trusted advisor” and advocate; Focal point for customer relationship, account, sales plans, proposals, contract negotiations, etc.
	Drives sales campaign and Business strategic initiatives
	Plan for account growth in the long term


Customers:


	Pursue growth through regular both face to face meetings and winning new customers to enlarge the assigned territory


People Management:


	Leverages and marshals cross functional company resources to address customers’ drivers and initiatives in a consultative manner.
	Guides and leverages management and executive sponsor interactions with the customer.
	Leads peers by influence to ensure coordination and support to pursue orders.


Requirements
You Must Have:


	Bachelor's Degree in engineering preferably with Electrical / Electronics / Instrumentation background.
	Minimum 5 years of experience in Instrumentation/Automation sales in O & G, Petrochemical, Power & water, Mining industry. Proven track record of success in this business environment.
	Proven track record in managing Key O&G Customers in the region is a must.
	Proven track record in Channel Management
	Technical expertise on Instrumentation & Fixed Gas biz is a must.
	Experienced in operating as a salesperson in an international, highly matrix organization; multi-country management experience is a must.
	Experienced in maneuvering through complex process with political agility and savvy
	Commercial excellence and Sales management through CRM (Salesforce)


Technical Skills & Required Specific Knowledge:


	 A well-developed sense of the industry and market trends in the assigned territory and vertical
	Good knowledge of our customers’ businesses and drivers
	Financial and business acumen
	Account/Channel Management, ability to use market and marketing data to build successful accounts plans
	Good knowledge of commercial terms, EPC contract T&Cs, etc.
	Be champion of Sales Process and Disciplines.


We value:


	Demonstrated ability to develop and foster strong customer relationships
	In-depth knowledge of Instrumentation/Fixed Gas Product and solutions.
	Strong verbal and written communications skills
	Familiarity with industry regulatory requirements and future mandates
	Ability to achieve results through influence in a matrixed-team environment
